title: stelis subana
intro: Stelis subana is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The extracts of Stelis subana have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
